info.name: Awamer API
info.description:
Complete API test collection for Awamer Platform backend.
Run volumes in order: Setup → Health → Auth → Users.

item.name: Volume 1: Setup
item.description: Register a test user and login to obtain an access token for subsequent tests.

item.name: Volume 3: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — register, login, refresh, forgot/reset password, logout.

item.name: Volume 4: Users
item.description: User profile CRUD, password change, and onboarding.
